hero.subtitle: Know your gaps. Practice right. Interview with confidence.
hero.description: Paste a job description + upload your CV. AI analyzes your skills against the JD and generates mock interview questions covering all required skills.

pasteUpload.title: PASTE & UPLOAD
pasteUpload.desc: Drop your JD and CV. We parse both instantly.

gapAnalysis.title: GAP ANALYSIS
gapAnalysis.desc: AI compares your skills against the job's demands.

practice.title: PRACTICE
practice.desc: Get mock interview Qs tailored to your gaps.

skillGap.title: SKILL ANALYZER
skillGap.desc: Paste a job description and upload your CV (or enter skills manually). AI shows matched vs missing skills and gives CV quick tips.

mockInterview.title: MOCK INTERVIEW
mockInterview.desc: AI generates interview questions based on the JD — covering both your strengths and gaps. Answer via text or audio. AI scores and gives feedback.

dashboard.title: SCORE TRACKER
dashboard.desc: Track your mock interview scores across sessions. See progress over time.

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z).
password.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z).
password.number: Password must contain at least one number (0-9).
password.special: Password must contain at least one special character (!@#$%^&*?).
